appearance.face: deep wrinkles, sharp eyes, short rough beard. Gruff but trustworthy impression
appearance.outfit: worn leather vest, thick cloth trousers, coin pouch and small dagger at waist

personality.behavior_pattern: Experienced merchant. Gruff but never forgets a debt. Skilled at trading.
personality.speech_style: Short and direct. No unnecessary words. Occasional sighs.
personality.motivation: Safely transport goods to Karendel for trade. Protect daughter Mira.

relationships.mira: Daughter. Teaching her the trade. Worries a lot.

saiki.description: Young adventurer who saved him from wolves. Grateful.

possessions.cart: Merchant cart pulled by a horse (packhorse). Cart wheel repair complete.
possessions.goods: Herbs, textiles, sundries to sell in Karendel. Some damaged by wolves.

travel.origin_note: A small fishing port in southeastern Ersia. Heading north along the trade road to Karendel with textiles and dried fish.

key_events: Rescued from wolves by the party. Requested help with cart repair.
